app.name: AllWasGood
app.tagline: Your AI marketing content suite — self-hosted.

dashboard.title: Welcome back
dashboard.subtitle: Spin up a campaign or jump into your latest project.
dashboard.no_generations: No generations yet — create your first piece of content.

api_keys.title: AI Provider API Keys
api_keys.description: Bring your own keys. Each key is encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM and only ever decrypted in memory at job runtime.
api_keys.label: Label (optional)
api_keys.base_url_hint: For OpenAI-compatible gateways like 9router, OpenRouter, Together, vLLM, etc.
api_keys.no_keys: No keys yet — add your first provider above.

smart_creation.title: Smart Creation
smart_creation.subtitle: Drop a product link, get marketing copy and images in seconds.
smart_creation.new_subtitle: Paste a product URL — we'll scrape it, write the copy, and (optionally) generate images.
smart_creation.empty_subtitle: Create your first marketing campaign by pasting a product URL.
smart_creation.product_url_hint: Tokopedia, Shopee, Amazon, Lazada, Etsy, Shopify, or any product page.
smart_creation.custom_placeholder: e.g. mention free shipping, focus on durability…
smart_creation.image_style_placeholder: e.g. minimalist studio photo with pastel background
smart_creation.images_off_hint: Toggle on to generate AI product photos based on the LLM's image prompts.
smart_creation.submit_hint: Runs in the background — you'll be redirected to the result page.
smart_creation.running_subtitle: Scraping the product, writing copy, and (if enabled) generating images. Refresh in a few seconds.
smart_creation.no_variants: No variants returned by the LLM.

publishing.title: Auto-Publishing
publishing.subtitle: Connect your social accounts and schedule posts to fire automatically.
publishing.new_subtitle: Pick the accounts, write a caption, attach media, and choose when it goes live.
publishing.accounts_empty: You haven't connected any social accounts yet.
publishing.scheduled_empty_subtitle: Connect at least one account, then schedule your first auto-post.
publishing.caption: Caption
publishing.caption_placeholder: Write the caption that will be posted…
publishing.extra_urls: Or paste media URLs directly (one per line)
publishing.err_no_account: Pick at least one account to publish to.

avatars.title: Digital Avatars
avatars.subtitle: Turn a script into a talking-head video.
avatars.new_subtitle: Paste a script, pick an avatar and a voice — we'll render the video in the background.
avatars.empty_subtitle: Generate your first talking-head video — pick a HeyGen avatar or a D-ID source photo, type your script, and go.
avatars.name: Project name (optional)
avatars.script_placeholder: Type the full text you want the avatar to speak — keep it under ~30s for best results.
avatars.avatar_id_hint: Find an avatar id from your provider's dashboard or browse via /v2/avatars (HeyGen).
avatars.avatar_id_hint_with_picker: Loaded directly from your HeyGen account. Configure more avatars at app.heygen.com.
avatars.avatar_photo_url_hint: D-ID needs a public photo URL of a face — square JPG/PNG works best.
avatars.submit_hint: Avatar rendering can take 1-5 minutes. You'll be redirected to the result page.
avatars.running_subtitle: Avatar provider is working on it. This can take a couple of minutes — refresh to check.
